title: The Birthday Surprise
content: Chloe thought she would spend her birthday alone because all her friends seemed busy. When she arrived home, the lights were off. As she opened the door, everyone shouted, “Happy Birthday!” Her friends had organized a surprise party. Liam, the person she secretly liked, had planned everything. He even baked her favorite strawberry cake. After everyone left, Liam gave her a small gift and wished her another happy birthday. Chloe realized the best surprise was not the party but discovering someone cared so much.
